title: artemisia frigida f. atropurpurea
intro: Artemisia frigida f. atropurpurea, also known as purple sage or frost sage, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that have been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Artemisia frigida f. atropurpurea include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed internally to promote overall well-being.
